Tests the `toString` method of `Number.prototype` by assigning it from `Object.prototype.toString`.

# Purpose
This code modifies the `Number` prototype by assigning the `toString` method from `Object.prototype` to `Number.prototype.toString`. This change allows instances of `Number` to use the `toString` method from `Object`, which returns a string representation of the object in the format `"[object Number]"`. The `assert` statement checks that this modification works as intended by verifying that calling `Number.prototype.toString()` returns the expected string `"[object Number]"`. This code provides narrow functionality by focusing on altering and testing the behavior of the `toString` method for `Number` objects.
